import React from 'react'; const StudentDashboard = () => { const formatCurrency = (amount) => { return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-IN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'INR', minimumFractionDigits: 0 }).format(amount); }; return (

); }; export default StudentDashboard;
